popularStory.headline:
Lady Alice Jenawaye Warren
(1505 – 28 March 1557)
popularStory.description:
Alice Olivia Jenawaye Warren born about 1505, married about 1526 at Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, England, Richard Warren son of Sir John and Lady Margaret De Leigh Warren.

Known Children:

zh.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye於1505年出生在英國坎布利其爾巴辛波。她於1526年與Richard Warren alias Waller在英國坎布利其爾巴辛波結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年3月28日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞吉爾德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye于1505年出生在英国坎布利其爾巴辛波。她于1526年与Richard Warren alias Waller在英国坎布利其爾巴辛波结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年3月28日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞吉爾德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye was born in 1505, in Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, England. She married Richard Warren alias Waller in 1526, in Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 March 1557, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye est née en 1505, à Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Warren alias Waller en 1526, à Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 mars 1557, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Guildford, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye wurde 1505 in Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1526 in Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, England Richard Warren alias Waller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. März 1557 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye è nata il nel 1505 nel Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, England. Lei sposato Richard Warren alias Waller nel 1526, nel Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 marzo 1557, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Guildford, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawayeは1505年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアバシングボウルンで生まれた。1526年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアバシングボウルンでRichard Warren alias Wallerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年3月28日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーグイルドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye(은)는 1505년 영국 캄브리지실르 배징보우른에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 캄브리지실르 배징보우른에서 Richard Warren alias Waller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 3월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 길드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye nasceu em 1505, em Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Warren alias Waller em 1526, em Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de março de 1557, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Guildford, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye родилась в 1505 г. в местности бассингбурн, камбриджешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Warren alias Waller в 1526 г. в местности бассингбурн, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 марта 1557 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Jenawaye nació en 1505, en Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Warren alias Waller en 1526, en Bassingbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1557, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Guildford, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
